'''鈭歨-n-ng''' ('''honung''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hit|hit]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hit|hit]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| honung
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihanang|thihanang]] || [[word:jihanang|jihanang]] || [[word:shihanang|shihanang]] || [[word:kihanang|kihanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhanang|thuthuhanang]] || [[word:jujuhanang|jujuhanang]] || [[word:shushuhanang|shushuhanang]] || [[word:kukuhanang|kukuhanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhanang|thuhanang]] || [[word:juhanang|juhanang]] || [[word:shuhanang|shuhanang]] || [[word:kuhanang|kuhanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhanang|thuhanang]] || [[word:juhanang|juhanang]] || [[word:shuhanang|shuhanang]] || [[word:kuhanang|kuhanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehanang|thehanang]] || [[word:jehanang|jehanang]] || [[word:shehanang|shehanang]] || [[word:kehanang|kehanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohanang|thothohanang]] || [[word:jojohanang|jojohanang]] || [[word:shoshohanang|shoshohanang]] || [[word:kokohanang|kokohanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohanang|thohanang]] || [[word:johanang|johanang]] || [[word:shohanang|shohanang]] || [[word:kohanang|kohanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohanang|thohanang]] || [[word:johanang|johanang]] || [[word:shohanang|shohanang]] || [[word:kohanang|kohanang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]] || [[word:hanang|hanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hanang|th忙hanang]] || [[word:j忙hanang|j忙hanang]] || [[word:sh忙hanang|sh忙hanang]] || [[word:k忙hanang|k忙hanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahanang|thathahanang]] || [[word:jajahanang|jajahanang]] || [[word:shashahanang|shashahanang]] || [[word:kakahanang|kakahanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahanang|thahanang]] || [[word:jahanang|jahanang]] || [[word:shahanang|shahanang]] || [[word:kahanang|kahanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahanang|thahanang]] || [[word:jahanang|jahanang]] || [[word:shahanang|shahanang]] || [[word:kahanang|kahanang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahanang|shahanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahanang|goshahanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahanang|gokishahanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahanangn眉|shahanangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahanangnkn眉|goshahanangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanangn眉|gokishahanangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahanangsh毛|shahanangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahanangnksh毛|goshahanangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahanangsh毛|gokishahanangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanangro|shahanangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanangnkro|goshahanangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanangro|gokishahanangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanangmu|shahanangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanangnkmu|goshahanangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanangmu|gokishahanangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahanangsher|shahanangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahanangnksher|goshahanangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahanangsher|gokishahanangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahanangng|shahanangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahanangnkng|goshahanangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahanangng|gokishahanangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahanangya|shahanangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahanangnkya|goshahanangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahanangya|gokishahanangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahanangyam|shahanangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahanangnkyam|goshahanangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahanangyam|gokishahanangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanangn眉sh毛|shahanangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanangnkn眉sh毛|goshahanangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanangn眉sh毛|gokishahanangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanangn眉ro|shahanangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanangnkn眉ro|goshahanangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanangn眉ro|gokishahanangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanangn眉mu|shahanangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanangnkn眉mu|goshahanangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanangn眉mu|gokishahanangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanangsh毛n眉|shahanangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanangnksh毛n眉|goshahanangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanangsh毛n眉|gokishahanangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanangsh毛ro|shahanangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanangnksh毛ro|goshahanangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanangsh毛ro|gokishahanangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanangsh毛mu|shahanangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanangnksh毛mu|goshahanangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanangsh毛mu|gokishahanangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanangron眉|shahanangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanangnkron眉|goshahanangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanangron眉|gokishahanangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanangrosh毛|shahanangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanangnkrosh毛|goshahanangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanangrosh毛|gokishahanangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanangromu|shahanangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanangnkromu|goshahanangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanangromu|gokishahanangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanangmun眉|shahanangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanangnkmun眉|goshahanangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanangmun眉|gokishahanangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanangmush毛|shahanangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanangnkmush毛|goshahanangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanangmush毛|gokishahanangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanangmuro|shahanangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanangnkmuro|goshahanangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanangmuro|gokishahanangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
